name: CA Technologies
description: CA Technologies, formerly Computer Associates, is a leading provider of information technology (IT) management software and solutions. The company's software helps organizations plan, develop, manage, and secure applications and IT infrastructure across mainframe, distributed, cloud, and mobile environments. CA Technologies was acquired by Broadcom Inc. in November 2018, and its products now form a core part of Broadcom's enterprise software portfolio, helping global enterprises drive digital transformation and optimize their IT operations.
